laws.title: Alt Text for Images
laws.description: Many product images lack descriptive alt text.
laws.remediation: Ensure all product images have meaningful alt attributes.

laws.title: Keyboard Navigation
laws.description: Difficulty in navigating drop-downs through keyboard.
laws.remediation: Improve focus styles and navigation logic for keyboard users.

laws.title: ARIA Landmarks
laws.description: Missing ARIA landmarks for different sections.
laws.remediation: Define ARIA landmarks for major content areas to aid screen readers.

laws.title: Form Labels
laws.description: Forms with fields lacking proper labels.
laws.remediation: Ensure all form fields have clearly associated labels.

laws.title: Video Captioning
laws.remediation: Add closed captions to all video content.
